Container.Name: snorcal
Container.Overview:
Self-hosted 3D slicing hub for OrcaSlicer and BambuStudio. Web UI for uploading models, configuring slice settings, painting face colors, and shipping gcode to Moonraker/Bambu/Snapmaker printers.
Requires two companion containers on the same Docker network: 1. redis (use the redis:7-alpine template from Community Apps) 2. One or both bambuddy slicer sidecars: - ghcr.io/maziggy/orca-slicer-api:latest (port 3003) - ghcr.io/maziggy/bambu-studio-api:latest (port 3001)
No shared volume needed — snorcal uploads 3MF and downloads gcode over HTTP.
Container.Requires: Redis container + at least one bambuddy slicer sidecar (ghcr.io/maziggy/orca-slicer-api or ghcr.io/maziggy/bambu-studio-api). Create a custom Docker network (e.g. `snorcal`) and attach all containers so they can resolve each other by name.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the Snorcal web UI.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite DB, uploaded models, and generated gcode.

Config.Name: REDIS_HOST
Config.Description: Hostname of the Redis container. Must be reachable on the same Docker network.

Config.Name: SLICER_URL_ORCASLICER
Config.Description: URL of the OrcaSlicer sidecar (bambuddy). Leave blank to disable OrcaSlicer engine.

Config.Name: SLICER_URL_BAMBUSTUDIO
Config.Description: URL of the BambuStudio sidecar (bambuddy). Leave blank to disable BambuStudio engine.

Config.Name: NODE_ENV
Config.Description: Set to production so backend serves the bundled frontend.

Config.Name: DEBUG_PRINTER
Config.Description: Set to 1 to enable verbose MQTT/printer adapter logs.
